title: SynthID, our imperceptible watermark for AI-generated content, is expanding to more partners.
summary: SynthID is an imperceptible watermarking system for AI-generated content developed by Google DeepMind. The tool is expanding to additional partners, indicating broader adoption and integration across platforms.
